actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The scorpion makes two Claw attacks and one Sting attack.

actions.name: Claw
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) Bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Grappled condition (escape DC 13) from one of two claws.

actions.name: Sting
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Piercing damage plus 11 (2d10) Poison damage.

tactical_info.combat_role: Controller/Striker - Grappler with devastating poison sting
tactical_info.positioning: Uses claws to grapple, then follows up with poisonous sting
tactical_info.damage_output: 12-18 damage per round (2 claws + sting), high poison damage
tactical_info.weaknesses: Reliant on close combat, no ranged options
tactical_info.synergies: Excellent at controlling single targets while dealing poison damage
